title: BYOK Provider Registry
description: Bring-your-own-key credential vault + provider-connection registry. Owns modelCreds (AES-256-GCM at rest), per-user credential CRUD, the OpenAI-compatible provider map (modelFor), and the Providers UI (connect OAuth / paste key / 1-token connectivity test). First rr vertical slice — extracted IN PLACE from the models-rahmanef-com monolith.
